# CartoBoost Agent Operating Guide

> CartoBoost is a Rust-first temporal-spatial regression toolbox with a Python API, CLI tooling, and a benchmark-driven validation pipeline.

Use this guide as the first read before making changes. Start in the relevant code component, then update contracts, then run the validation commands defined in AGENTS.

## Workspace Overview
- [Repository README](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/README.md): global project intent, quick workflow examples, and component-level capabilities.
- [Root AGENTS instructions](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/AGENTS.md): workspace development rules, validation commands, and release caveats.
- [Cargo workspace manifest](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/Cargo.toml): workspace members and shared build configuration.
- [Python project manifest](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/pyproject.toml): dependency groups and Python packaging settings.
- [Python environment lockfile](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/uv.lock): pinned dependency state for reproducible Python builds.
- [Docs home](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/index.md): documentation index and user-facing map.

## Core Components
- [cartoboost-core crate](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/crates/cartoboost-core): shared modeling core, splitters, objective logic, and schema contracts.
- [cartoboost-cli crate](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/crates/cartoboost-cli): command implementation for `train`, `predict`, `eval`, and `inspect`.
- [cartoboost-neural crate](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/crates/cartoboost-neural): Rust-native neural embeddings, node2vec, GraphSAGE, HeteroGraphSAGE, HinSAGE, graph feature validation, and encoder artifacts.
- [Graph features guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/graph-features.md): node2vec, GraphSAGE, HeteroGraphSAGE, HinSAGE, directed source-target features, and graph feature bundle contracts.
- [cartoboost-py crate](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/crates/cartoboost-py): PyO3 binding layer.
- [Python package API](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/python/cartoboost): user-facing Python package and ergonomic wrappers.
- [Benchmarks crate workspace](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/benches): timing, benchmark definitions, and reporting harnesses.
- [Scripts folder](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/scripts): acceptance metrics and dataset generation utilities used for validation.

## Documentation Contracts
- [Docs index](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/index.md): entrypoint and topical structure.
- [Installation guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/installation.md): install paths and optional extras.
- [Getting started](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): first run flow and local checks.
- [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md): authoritative API contracts.
- [CLI reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/cli.md): argument/flag behavior and output formats.
- [Python estimator guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/python-estimator.md): estimator usage and expected semantics.
- [CLI guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/cli.md): workflow-oriented CLI usage patterns.
- [Feature schema](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_schema.md): data schema and validation contract.
- [Model artifact format](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/model_artifact.md): serialization and compatibility assumptions.
- [Constraints](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/constraints.md): legal/algorithmic domain constraints.
- [Spatial modeling](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/spatial_modeling.md): modeling assumptions for route/time/geographic features.
- [Graph features](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/graph-features.md): node2vec, GraphSAGE, HeteroGraphSAGE, HinSAGE, directionality, and metapath contracts.
- [Evaluation protocol](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/evaluation_protocol.md): protocol for trustworthy evaluations.
- [Benchmarks overview](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/index.md), [NYC Taxi](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/nyc-taxi.md), [Lane-level acceptance](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/lane-level.md): expected evidence format.

## Where to Edit by Change Type
- For core algorithm changes: edit `crates/cartoboost-core` and then update [feature schema](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/feature_schema.md) + [tests](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/tests) as needed.
- For CLI behavior and I/O format changes: edit `crates/cartoboost-cli/src/main.rs`, update [CLI guide](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/user-guide/cli.md), [CLI reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/cli.md), and integration tests under `../tests/integration`.
- For Python API changes: edit `python/cartoboost`, update [Python API reference](https://github.com/TheCulliganMan/CartoBoost/blob/main/docs/reference/python-api.md), and add/adjust tests under `../tests/python`.
- For bindings/debugging interop: edit `crates/cartoboost-py/src/lib.rs`, then run `uv run --group dev maturin develop` after any native changes.
- For benchmark or acceptance behavior changes: edit `scripts`, benchmark sources in `benches`, and benchmark docs under `docs/benchmarks`.

## Validation and Runtime Checks
- Run `cargo fmt --all --check` before any Rust merge attempt.
- Run `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` before finalizing CLI/core edits.
- Run `cargo test --workspace` for native Rust behavior changes.
- Run `uv run --group dev ruff format --check python tests scripts` and `uv run --group dev ruff check python tests scripts` after Python-facing edits.
- Run `uv run --group dev pytest` after changing Python APIs or estimator behavior.
- Use `just validate` for full local validation only when comprehensive smoke coverage is needed.

## Optional
- [llms.txt spec](https://llmstxt.org/index.md): authoritative markdown format this file follows.
